en: Oh, I'm gonna have a drink. Yes, sir. What you sippin' on?
Probably just a hard seltzer. Nice. What kind? Just a JCPenney.
The department store? Yeah, they're doing hard seltzers now.
What? Yeah. Ever since White Claw blew up, everyone's doing them.
ko: 뭐? 응. White Claw 터진 이후로 다들 만들고 있어.

en: Bud Light, Corona, JCPenney. Don't they just make clothes?
Yeah, I don't know, man. Okay, I'm not on the board of the company.
ko: 응, 나도 모르겠어. 내가 이사회에 있는 건 아니잖아.

en: This is just a thing that I like. What flavor is it?
Men's jackets? It's not all men's jackets. It's a variety pack.
ko: 남성용 재킷? 전부 남성용 재킷은 아니야.

en: I'm sippin' on Belts and Ties. Does it taste like Belts and Ties?
Uh, no, it tastes like grape. You stupid? Been in the house.
Oh, bed man! Oh, you're drinking JCPs?
ko: 오, 이 사람. 오, 너 JCP 마시는 거야?

en: You know it! You know about this? Got some seltzers myself.
ko: 당연하지. 이거 알아? 나도 셀처 가져왔어.

en: Jiffy Lube. Lube it up. Cheers, man. Good to see you.
What is going on? Come on, everyone's doing it. JCPenney, Jiffy Lube.
Exxon, Verizon. Dr. Riccardi. Who? My dentist.
That one's actually really good. I don't understand why you like these.
ko: 왜 이걸 좋아하는지 이해가 안 돼.

en: You don't have to understand everything, John. Yeah, like, we don't understand what you see in your girlfriend.
What? But we don't get angry. No, we don't yell at you. No. Am I awake?
ko: 뭐? 근데 우린 화 안 내잖아.

en: That was, like, at the summer variety pack. Oh, nice. This is awesome. That's for everybody.
And, John, if you want one, take one. Oh, I hate when these get in there.
ko: 아, 이게 들어가면 싫은데. 어, 그거 벨트 버클이야?

en: Is that a belt buckle? Yeah, the JCPenney ones, sometimes they get in there. Yeah.
ko: 응, JCPenney 것들은 가끔 들어가. 응.

en: Stop slurping like that. Just chill out. Oh, who's this an impression of?
Oh, I'm John. John. Me. Yeah, it's John.
Oh, yeah, that's cool. Does the...desk have one? I don't know. Probably not.
I don't know. Okay, so, yeah, it does have one.
What is going on?! Try one! Fine!
That's pretty good. Oh, my God.
Cheers. Cheers, brothers. I was wrong.
Desk art seltzer. It's in the desk.
ko: 책상 아트 셀처. 책상 안에 있어.
